title: TOUR NO TEXT
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Okay
[00:00:05.76] So chillin in Wendy's somewhere in New Jersey
[00:00:11.96] Wrap it up this trip that we've been on
[00:00:15.48] be
[00:00:16.96] packing up all my belongings
[00:00:21.20] Into a budget rental car truck and driving across country with the final destination being Brooklyn, New York moving
[00:00:30.12] Denver, Brooklyn
[00:00:34.44] Stopped in a bunch of different great places
[00:00:41.48] We're almost there right now
[00:00:46.20] What else should I say?
[00:00:49.80] And it's your birthday right?
[00:00:52.16] It is my birthday right now
[00:01:00.24] Sorry
[00:01:20.28] So yeah, so a birthday we're in Wendy's
[00:01:22.28] New York haven't even seen the place moving into yet, but this tour has been really fun and successful
[00:01:33.16] with goofy and
[00:01:36.60] Inspiring it's been great so
[00:01:52.28] hey
[00:02:09.76] Of course sure
[00:02:11.76] Yeah, just a second here. I need to play some other things.
[00:02:21.76] Okay.
[00:02:22.76] This motherfucker right now wrapped for 10 and half hours straight and he made it up all in the spot.
[00:02:41.76] And then he lost his voice and couldn't talk for a week.
[00:02:43.76] Let's fucking leave it!
[00:02:47.76] And my name is Little Rockets. If you guys want to throw down, if you believe in falling in love and if you believe in dying,
[00:02:54.76] and someone else is on tonight, if that person is yourself, that's totally acceptable.
[00:02:58.76] Because you're the most best person in the entire universe that you've never fallen in love with.
[00:03:02.76] And I would rather die than live without everyone here tonight.
[00:03:07.76] Let's throw the fuck down and back. This song's still kept real.
[00:03:16.76] If the life I make is never still time, why don't you let's throw it?
[00:03:24.76] Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah.
[00:03:31.76] So the day will come when we can skip it back.
[00:03:36.76] We'll play the darkness, we'll walk all the lights burn out.
[00:03:43.76] And I know there's a girl who's gonna say to you that we will.
[00:03:50.76] And we can go and hold all the light in the streets.
